title: My Stepson Claimed I Abandoned The Cabin And Got Me Arrested. So I Watched Him Lose It All.
description: When my stepson forged a codicil claiming I abandoned our lake cabin, he didn’t just try to steal my home, he staged a break-in and had me arrested for felony theft. A forensic linguist proved the document was a fake, the charges were dismissed, and I won a $400,000 malicious prosecution judgment. Now that cabin is a women’s retreat with a plaque reading ‘Justice Preserves.’ #FamilyBetrayal #LegalRevenge #JusticeServed
thumb_text: FORGED CODICIL, ARRESTED FOR THEFT, $400K JUSTICE
pinned_comment: What would you do if your stepson forged a codicil claiming you abandoned your lake cabin and got you arrested for theft? Share your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: A FORENSIC LINGUIST PROVED THE CODICIL WAS FORGED
TURNED THE CABIN INTO A WOMEN'S RETREAT
